last_item: Extend `bin/backlog-agent-status.mjs` to record per tick: (a) a `completed` / marker-transition flag (did this tick move a backlog item to Done / `[x]`?, since today's stream only logs the item *worked on* + whether a `work_commit` was produced, and `exit_code` does not indicate completion), and (b) `repo_slug` (e.g. `owner/repo`, derived from `git remote`) + the FULL commit SHA (currently only a short 7-char SHA is stored). Goal: let downstream dashboards list genuinely-completed items per usage window with working `github.com/<owner>/<repo>/commit/<sha>` links, without after-the-fact reconstruction. **Prereq for backlog-dashboard "Away/Recap" view** (see backlog-dashboard `docs/Backlog.md`, Thinking). [W0 foundation — prereq for efficiency metrics + fleet digest.]
